block1.label: // 01 — PLATFORM
block1.body1: Instra is an award-winning marketing intelligence platform that transforms the way brands engage with their audiences. Built for founders, growth operators, and marketing teams who demand precision, speed, and measurable results.
block1.body2: Our goal is to help 1,000,000 businesses scale their marketing operations with AI-powered tools that think and act like a seasoned operator — available around the clock.

block2.label: // 02 — PHILOSOPHY
block2.body: If you don't see us at a conference or pitching another deck, you should know we're building — constantly iterating on the next feature that will change how you approach your market. We believe marketing intelligence should be as sharp as the teams that use it, and we're not stopping until it is.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Instra and how it can benefit your business.

general.a: Instra is an advanced marketing platform designed to navigate custom workflows just like a live operator would. It responds to customer inquiries with human-like interactions, enhancing the customer experience.
It integrates directly into your existing infrastructure and utilizes cutting-edge AI models to automate and optimize your marketing operations continuously.

pricing.a: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all of our standard plans so you can test our features.

security.a: Absolutely. We employ AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 for all data in transit.

usecase.q: What plugins are available on the free plan?
usecase.a: The free open-core plan includes all community plugins and core platform capabilities. Pro plugins — advanced automations, priority integrations, enterprise connectors — activate on any paid plan.

usecase.q: How do I install a plugin?
usecase.a: Go to the Plugin Registry in your Instra dashboard, click Install on any listed plugin, and it loads into your workspace immediately. No restart or configuration required.

usecase.q: Can I connect my existing marketing tools?
usecase.a: Yes. Instra integrates with HubSpot, Mailchimp, Google Analytics, Meta Ads, Slack, and dozens more via scoped OAuth — plugins only access what they need.
The plugin ecosystem supports GitHub, Jira, Vercel, Supabase, Stripe, and more. Dev-focused plugins enable webhook triggers, CI/CD hooks, and custom event pipelines.

usecase.q: Is the plugin system really open source?
usecase.a: Yes. The core platform is MIT-licensed and the plugin API is fully open. Any developer can build and submit plugins via a pull request or npm under @instra scope.
Plugins communicate exclusively through the PluginContext API — no direct database or env access. Every plugin action is logged to an audit trail.

usecase.q: Can I build a custom private plugin?
usecase.a: Absolutely. Private plugins stay within your workspace and are never published to the registry. Write them in TypeScript following the InstraPlugin interface.

usecase.q: What happens if a plugin breaks?
usecase.a: Each plugin slot is wrapped in an ErrorBoundary. A failing plugin is isolated and shows an error state — it never crashes the rest of your workspace.

contact.title: Still have a question?
contact.desc: If you didn't find your answer, feel free to reach out.

items.title: Transparency
items.description: Every metric, every decision — open and auditable. No black boxes, no hidden agendas. You own your data.
items.detail: Every data point we surface is traceable to its source. Our audit trail covers every pipeline step — ingestion, transformation, and output. You can inspect, export, and verify any result at any time. No vendor lock-in, no algorithmic black boxes.

items.title: Precision
items.description: Marketing without signal is guesswork. We surface the exact data that moves the needle, nothing more.
items.detail: We built precision into the core. Instead of drowning you in dashboards, Instra identifies the single highest-leverage signal in your dataset and surfaces it first. Less noise, faster decisions, better outcomes — measured and proven.

items.title: Integrity
items.description: We don't cut corners. Every insight is cross-validated and every recommendation is evidence-backed.
items.detail: Every recommendation Instra generates is cross-validated against at least three independent signals before it reaches you. Our models are audited quarterly, and any anomaly in output quality triggers an immediate rollback to a verified checkpoint.

aboutPlugins.label: // Open-core platform
aboutPlugins.heading: Extend everything with plugins
aboutPlugins.body1: Instra is built on an open-core model — the platform's foundations are open and free to inspect, fork, and self-host. Subscription plans unlock a curated marketplace of premium plugins that accelerate your marketing operations.
aboutPlugins.body2: Every plugin is sandboxed, permission-scoped, and auditable. Third-party developers publish to the Instra Plugin Registry after a security review — giving your team a trusted ecosystem without vendor lock-in.
aboutPlugins.modelDesc: Core capabilities ship with every account. Pro plugins activate on any paid plan — no per-plugin billing, no surprise charges.
aboutPlugins.morePluginsHint: New plugins ship every sprint. Browse the full registry.

plugins.name: Plugin Alpha
plugins.description: A foundational utility included with every Instra account. Integrates into your core workflow on day one.

plugins.name: Plugin Beta
plugins.description: Lightweight automation module for recurring tasks. Ships with the open-core and requires no configuration.

plugins.name: Plugin Gamma
plugins.description: Advanced data pipeline extension with real-time sync. Available on Professional and Enterprise plans.

plugins.name: Plugin Delta
plugins.description: Enterprise-grade reporting module. Exports structured datasets to any downstream BI tool with a single click.

Continued using the platform regularly after their initial setup, showing lasting engagement and trust.

featuresHeader.label: // CORE CAPABILITIES
featuresHeader.heading:
Built to
Perform
featuresHeader.description: Everything your marketing team needs — AI content, scheduling, analytics, and an open plugin layer — unified in a single platform.

block1.label: // 01 — INTELLIGENCE
block1.body1: Instra brings together AI-powered content creation, cross-platform scheduling, and deep analytics in a single workflow. Stop switching between tools — every capability you need is right here.
block1.body2: From first draft to published post, Instra handles the heavy lifting so your team can focus on strategy, creativity, and growth.

block2.label: // 02 — EXTENSIBILITY
block2.body: Every feature in Instra is a foundation, not a ceiling. The open plugin system lets you extend, integrate, and automate beyond what any closed platform can offer. Ship custom workflows in hours, not sprints.

openSourcePlugins.label: // OPEN SOURCE
openSourcePlugins.heading:
Build your own
plugin
openSourcePlugins.body: Instra's plugin system is fully open. Any developer can extend the platform — add widgets, register routes, hook into events, and publish to the community registry. Zero gatekeeping.
openSourcePlugins.ctaTagline: Full API reference, manifest schema, and example plugins are available in the documentation.
openSourcePlugins.githubAriaLabel: View Instra on GitHub (opens in new tab)

steps.title: Write your plugin
steps.description: Create index.ts with an InstraPlugin export. Implement init(ctx) to register widgets, routes, or event listeners via the PluginContext API.

steps.title: Add a manifest
steps.description: Declare name, version, permissions, and author in manifest.json. The manifest is validated against a JSON Schema before your plugin loads.

steps.title: Publish to the registry
steps.description: Submit a pull request or publish via npm under the @instra scope. Community plugins are reviewed for security before appearing in the marketplace.

verify_email.panel_desc: Check your email and enter the 6-digit code to activate your Instra account. The code expires in 10 minutes.
verify_email.panel_card_desc: Each verification code expires after 10 minutes and can only be used once. Request a new one if yours expires.

usecaseHeader.label: // REAL-WORLD APPLICATIONS
usecaseHeader.heading:
One Platform.
Every Workflow.
usecaseHeader.description: Marketers and developers use Instra's plugin ecosystem to eliminate context-switching and build unified, automated workflows.

usecaseProblem.heading:
Your tools don't
talk to each other.

items.title: Constant context-switching
items.body: Teams jump between 8–12 tools daily. Every switch kills focus and burns time that should go toward actual work.

items.title: Data trapped in silos
items.body: Analytics live in one tab, CRM in another, comms in a third. Nothing connects, so nothing compounds.

items.title: Integration tax
items.body: Every new tool means a new manual process or a fragile automation chain. The stack grows; the productivity doesn't.

usecaseHowItWorks.heading:
Simple by design.
Powerful by default.

steps.title: Choose a plugin
steps.body: Browse the open registry. Filter by category, compatibility, or team rating. Preview before installing.

steps.title: Install in one click
steps.body: Plugins load into your workspace instantly. No configuration files, no CLI, no restart required.

steps.title: Connect your tools
steps.body: Authorize integrations via OAuth or API key. Permissions are scoped — plugins only access what they need.

steps.title: Automate your workflow
steps.body: Trigger actions across tools using plugin events. Set it once, let it run. Audit every action in the log.

usecaseWorkflow.heading:
From setup to
automation in minutes.

steps.title: Choose
steps.body: Pick from 40+ community and premium plugins in the registry.

steps.title: Install
steps.body: One-click install directly into your Instra workspace.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Authorize your existing tools with scoped OAuth permissions.

steps.title: Automate
steps.body: Configure triggers and let your workflow run hands-free.

usecaseIntegrations.heading:
Works with the tools
you already use.

issues.no_content: Your post has no text content.
issues.content_too_short: Post text is too short ({{length}} chars). Aim for at least 30 characters.
issues.content_too_long: Post text is very long ({{length}} chars). Consider shortening for better readability.
issues.no_media: Add an image or video to boost engagement.
issues.no_hashtags: No hashtags detected. Add relevant hashtags to increase discoverability.
issues.too_many_hashtags: Too many hashtags ({{count}}). Aim for 5–15 for optimal reach.
issues.single_platform: Post is only on one platform. Consider cross-posting to reach more people.
issues.poor_timing: Post was published at {{hour}}:00 — outside peak engagement hours (7:00–22:00).
issues.no_cta: No call-to-action detected. Encourage your audience to act.

tips.no_posts: Publish your first post to start getting personalised analytics tips.
tips.all_good: Great job! All your recent posts score well. Keep up the quality.
tips.no_content: Try adding text content to your next post — posts with captions get significantly more engagement.
tips.content_too_short: Your post text is very short. Expand it to at least 30 characters to give your audience more context.
tips.content_too_long: Consider shortening your post text for better readability on mobile.
tips.no_media: Posts with images or videos receive on average 2–3× more engagement. Add media to your next post.
tips.no_hashtags: Add 5–15 relevant hashtags to your posts to reach a broader audience.
tips.too_many_hashtags: Reduce your hashtag count to 5–15 per post — too many can look spammy.
tips.no_platforms: Select at least one platform before publishing to make your post live.
tips.single_platform: Cross-post to multiple platforms to maximise your content's reach.
tips.poor_timing: Try scheduling your next post between 7:00 and 22:00 for higher visibility.
tips.no_cta: End your post with a clear call-to-action — ask your audience a question or invite them to click a link.

field.name: Campaign Name
field.name_help: A short, recognizable label for your campaign (max 100 chars).
field.action_type_help: Choose what this campaign does on each run.
field.posts_help: Select one or more of your posts to publish automatically.
field.posts_empty: You have no posts yet. Create a post first, then set up a campaign.
field.url_help: The endpoint that receives an HTTP request on each run. Must use https or http.
field.method_help: HTTP verb sent to the webhook. POST is recommended for most use cases.
field.body_help: Optional JSON body sent with POST/PUT/PATCH requests.
field.interval_help: How often the campaign runs. Minimum 1 minute. Use the presets above for common intervals.
field.total_runs_help: Total number of times this campaign will execute before it completes (1–10,000).
field.start_at_help: Schedule the first run for a future date and time. Leave empty to start immediately.

confirm_delete.title: Delete Campaign
confirm_delete.description: This will permanently delete the campaign and all its run history. This cannot be undone.
confirm_delete.label: Type the campaign name to confirm
